sections.instruction: Complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
Choose the correct letter A, B or C.

questions.content: What is the project that Mark and Gina want to start?
options: B Directions to the business school.
C Explaining the business school experience.

questions.content: How will they convey the information?
They want to do this project because
options: A students worry about their studies.
B they want to obtain a good grade.
C they want to attract future business school applicants.

options: A tourists in the hotel in this area.
C people who are living in this area.

questions.content: The results of the questionnaire should be
options: A directly entered into the computer.
C submitted directly to Professor Curran.

questions.content: Why should John give a copy of plans to the professor?
options: A To receive a good grade.

questions.content: How will the instructions be presented?
options: A Given by a group representative.
B Given by all members of the group.

questions.content: What does Dani suggest to John when those subjects receive the questionnaire?
options: A Divide into 2 part to argue.
B Focus on the opinion of the interviewees.
C Take consideration of both sides.

questions.content: Why is this project particularly important to John?
options: A To earn respect from professors in the department.

questions.content: Why did the lecturer choose to focus on the Pleasanton Town Market?
options: A It was the first ever Town Market.
B It has been covered extensively in local history classes.
C It is often mentioned in some literature of the library.
